title: ML Study Roadmap
description: Three guided study tracks from absolute beginner to Staff+ FAANG ML engineer. Choose your track based on your background and timeline: 3-Month Crash (ML-experienced, ~20 hrs/wk), 6-Month Standard (some ML exposure, ~10-15 hrs/wk), or 12-Month Deep (true beginner, ~8-10 hrs/wk).

timeline.title: Interview Fundamentals
timeline.event:
3-Month Crash — Month 1

ML Fundamentals — bias-variance, metrics, cross-validation, data leakage, model selection.
Supervised Learning — linear/logistic regression, trees, XGBoost, SVM — math + code.
Chestnut Questions — sections 1-20: core ML Q&As.
Behavioral (STAR) — sections 1-8: core STAR scenarios.

timeline.title: Deep Learning & System Design
timeline.event:
3-Month Crash — Month 2

NN Training — optimizers, normalization, regularization, mixed precision, FSDP.
Types of ANNs — 7 architectures: CNN, RNN, Transformer, GAN, VAE, Diffusion, ViT.
Activation Functions — 10 functions with SVG curves.
Foundations from Scratch — micrograd, BPE tokenizer, nanoGPT, KV cache.
ML System Design — 6 full designs, deployment, monitoring, drift.
Recommendation Systems — CF, MF, two-tower, multi-stage, FAISS.

timeline.title: Staff+ Deep Dive & Mock Interviews
timeline.event:
3-Month Crash — Month 3

Staff+ System Design — ML platform, 10M+ QPS real-time, ranking, A/B at scale.
LLM Engineering — RAG, PEFT, RLHF, agents, safety, evaluation, serving.
Production ML Ops — online learning, feature platform, model cascades.
Leadership & Strategy — org-wide influence, tech vision, incident response.
Company Focus — Staff+ round structure per company.
Mock Interviews — full transcripts with scoring rubrics.

timeline.title: Foundations
timeline.event:
6-Month Standard — Months 1-2

ML Fundamentals — bias-variance, metrics, CV, data leakage.
Supervised Learning — linear/logistic regression, trees, XGBoost, SVM.
Unsupervised Learning — K-Means, DBSCAN, PCA, t-SNE, UMAP.
ML Math — probability, linear algebra, info theory, optimization.
Data-Centric AI — augmentation, weak supervision, active learning.
A/B Testing — CUPED, sequential testing, network effects.

timeline.title: Deep Learning & System Design
timeline.event:
6-Month Standard — Months 3-4

Intro to Neural Networks — perceptron, backprop, full timeline.
Activation Functions — 10 functions with derivatives.
NN Training — optimizers, normalization, FP32/FP16/INT8, FSDP.
Types of ANNs — 7 architectures with FAANG Q&As.
Foundations from Scratch — micrograd, BPE, nanoGPT, KV cache from scratch.
ML System Design — 6 designs, drift detection, monitoring.
Rec Systems — CF, two-tower, multi-stage, HNSW, FAISS.
GPU Deep Dive — memory hierarchy, FlashAttention, quantization, vLLM.
ML Project Structure — Ng-style: HLP, error analysis, orthogonalization.

timeline.title: Staff+ & Advanced + Interview Prep
timeline.event:
6-Month Standard — Months 5-6

NLP Deep Dive — Word2Vec through Transformers, BERT, LoRA, QLoRA.
Computer Vision — AlexNet through ViT, detection, segmentation, SSL.
RL & RLHF — DQN, PPO, TRPO, InstructGPT, DPO, KTO.
LLM Engineering — prompt patterns, RAG, PEFT, RLHF, agents, serving.
Staff+ System Design — ML platform, 10M+ QPS, distributed training.
Production ML Ops — online learning, feature platform, cascades.
Interpretability & Fairness — SHAP, LIME, bias metrics, EU AI Act.
Leadership & Strategy — org influence, vision, roadmaps, mentorship.
Chestnut Questions — all 30 Q&As.
Behavioral (STAR) — all 13 scenarios.
Company Focus — Staff+ round structure per FAANG.
Research Papers — 10 foundational papers with interview angles.
Coding Patterns — LRU cache, rate limiter, online K-Means, AUC.
Mock Interviews — full transcripts with scoring rubrics.

timeline.title: Math Foundations
timeline.event:
12-Month Deep — Months 1-2

ML Math — probability, linear algebra, calculus, statistics.
Linear algebra essentials: vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, SVD.
Probability: Bayes theorem, distributions, MLE, KL divergence.
Calculus: partial derivatives, chain rule, gradient descent.
Statistics: hypothesis testing, p-values, confidence intervals.

timeline.title: Classical ML Foundations
timeline.event:
12-Month Deep — Months 3-4

ML Fundamentals — bias-variance, metrics, CV, data leakage.
Supervised Learning — linear/logistic regression, trees, ensembles, SVM.
Unsupervised Learning — K-Means, DBSCAN, PCA, t-SNE, UMAP, anomaly detection.
Data-Centric AI — augmentation, weak supervision, confident learning.
A/B Testing — design, CUPED, sequential testing, network effects.

timeline.title: Deep Learning
timeline.event:
12-Month Deep — Months 5-7

Intro to Neural Networks — perceptron, backprop, full timeline 1943-present.
Activation Functions — 10 functions with SVG curves and derivatives.
NN Training — optimizers, normalization, regularization, mixed precision.
Types of ANNs — 7 architectures: CNN, RNN, Transformer, GAN, VAE, Diffusion, ViT.
Foundations from Scratch — micrograd, BPE, nanoGPT, KV cache from scratch.
Coding Patterns — LRU cache, rate limiter, online K-Means, AUC.

timeline.title: System Design & Advanced Topics
timeline.event:
12-Month Deep — Months 8-9

ML System Design — 6 designs, deployment, drift, monitoring.
Recommendation Systems — CF, two-tower, multi-stage ranking, HNSW, FAISS.
GPU Deep Dive — memory hierarchy, FlashAttention, quantization, vLLM.
ML Project Structure — HLP, error analysis, orthogonalization, fairness.
NLP Deep Dive — Word2Vec, GloVe, BERT, LoRA, QLoRA, SoTA architectures.
Computer Vision — AlexNet through ViT, detection, segmentation, self-supervised.
RL & RLHF — DQN, PPO, TRPO, InstructGPT, DPO, KTO.

timeline.title: Staff+ & Advanced
timeline.event:
12-Month Deep — Months 10-11

LLM Engineering — RAG, PEFT, RLHF, safety, agents, serving, context optimization.
Staff+ System Design — ML platform, 10M+ QPS real-time, distributed training, labeling.
Production ML Ops — online learning, feature platform, model cascades, continuous training.
Interpretability & Fairness — SHAP, LIME, Integrated Gradients, bias, EU AI Act.
Leadership & Strategy — org-wide influence, tech vision, incident response, mentorship.
Research Papers — 10 foundational papers with intuition and interview angles.

timeline.title: Interview Prep & Mock Interviews
timeline.event:
12-Month Deep — Month 12

Mock Interview Walkthroughs — full transcripts for Google L6, Meta E6, Amazon L6.
Chestnut Questions — all 30 Q&As, focus on sections 21-30 Staff+ level.
Behavioral (STAR) — all 13 scenarios, focus on sections 9-13 Staff+.
Company Focus — target your company: Google L6, Meta E6, Amazon L6, Apple ICT5.

details:
C — Crash

3 Months • ~20 hrs/wk

Prerequisites

ML experience

Solid coding skills

System design basics

3-Month Crash Plan →

S — Standard

6 Months • ~10-15 hrs/wk

Prerequisites

Some ML exposure

Comfortable with Python

6-Month Standard Plan →

D — Deep

12 Months • ~8-10 hrs/wk

Prerequisites

No ML background assumed

Beginner-friendly Python

12-Month Deep Plan →
All tracks include interview prep. C = fastest to FAANG, S = balanced depth & speed, D = most thorough foundation.

How to use this roadmap

Each track is a complete study plan with weekly milestones. All linked resources are in the ai bytes documentation portal. Start with the track that matches your background and work through the phases sequentially. The timeline below shows the recommended order for each track — identified by the badge color.

Track legend: C = 3-Month Crash (orange), S = 6-Month Standard (purple), D = 12-Month Deep (blue). Within each track, phases are ordered left-to-right, top-to-bottom.
